answers.where: I am on a bright toy dock fishing in a Roblox-like island water area.
answers.action: Press the large CAST button to throw the bobber, then reel when a bite appears.
answers.response: The screen shows a caught Bubble Guppy reward, coins, backpack, level and next line upgrade.
answers.reward: The catch card and coins show fish value and progression toward better line upgrades.
answers.game_look: Generated UI buttons, icons, reward card and TTF labels now make the screen read more like a casual fishing game.

problem: Still below product target: world art, character, water and visible model quality are rough shape/first-pass assets and do not match the fake-shot richness yet.
next: Replace the focal world/character/water with stronger selected or generated 3D art assets and then rerun the native screenshot/product gate.
